# Adicionar provider de banco ao vigia-exporter

## Objetivo

Criar um novo binГЎrio ou subcomando para um SGBD seguindo o padrГЈo dos exporters legados.

## Estrutura de diretГіrios

```text
vigia-exporter/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cmd/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ vigia-export/
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ main.go              # Cobra root: sqlserver, mysql, ...
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ internal/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ collector/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ collector.go         # GetData() genГ©rico
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ snapshot/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ builder.go           # Monta SnapshotV1
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ providers/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ sqlserver/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mysql/
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ postgresql/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ go.mod
в””в”Ђв”Ђ Makefile
```

## Passos

### 1. Registrar provider em ADR-0004

Confirme que o engine estГЎ aprovado no roadmap.

### 2. Criar pacote provider

```go
package postgresql

import (
    "database/sql"
    _ "github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/stdlib"
)

type Config struct {
    Host     string
    Port     int
    User     string
    Password string
    Database string
    SSLMode  string
}

func Open(cfg Config) (*sql.DB, error) {
    dsn := fmt.Sprintf(
        "host=%s port=%d user=%s password=%s dbname=%s sslmode=%s",
        cfg.Host, cfg.Port, cfg.User, cfg.Password, cfg.Database, cfg.SSLMode,
    )
    db, err := sql.Open("pgx", dsn)
    if err != nil {
        return nil, err
    }
    if err := db.Ping(); err != nil {
        return nil, err
    }
    return db, nil
}
```

### 3. Embutir scripts

Scripts gerados em `internal/providers/postgresql/scripts.go`:

```go
// Code generated by vigia-scripts codegen. DO NOT EDIT.
package postgresql

var Scripts = map[string]string{
    "postgresql.health.version": `SELECT version() AS version`,
}
```

### 4. Subcomando Cobra

```go
var postgresCmd = &cobra.Command{
    Use:   "postgresql",
    Short: "Coleta de PostgreSQL",
    RunE:  runPostgresql,
}
```

### 5. Montar snapshot

Use `internal/snapshot.Builder`:

```go
snap := snapshot.NewBuilder("vigia-exporter", version).
    Target("postgresql", alias).
    CollectedAt(time.Now().UTC()).
    Scripts(results).
    Build()
```

### 6. Validar contra schema

```bash
go run ./cmd/validate-snapshot snapshot.json ../vigia-spec/schemas/snapshot-v1.json
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Driver em `go.mod` com versГЈo fixa
- [ ] UsuГЎrio read-only documentado no README
- [ ] Teste Testcontainers para o engine
- [ ] Cross-compile no Goreleaser
- [ ] Provider ID alinhado ao schema (`postgresql`, nГЈo `postgres`)

## Legado DbaMonitor

Mapeamento de nomes:

| Legado | Vigia |
|--------|-------|
| `exporter-sql` | `vigia-export sqlserver` |
| `exporter-mysql` | `vigia-export mysql` |
| `exporter-sql-azure` | `vigia-export azuresql` |
| `output.json` | `snapshot.json` |
| `ScriptProvider` | `target.engine` |
